title: KB Guidance Provided
description: Emitted by `kb check <query>` when the vault is queried for coverage confidence. The escalate field is the dynamic cadence signal: false = coast on vault knowledge; true = spawn deer-flow research. Enables tracking of how often Claude defers to vault vs escalates to deep research. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): kb publishes this event but no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

escalate.description: true = vault coverage insufficient, escalate to research

match_count.description: Vault entries that matched the query
